cards.title: Clinical Signs & Eponyms
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Cardiovascular: Corrigan, Duroziez, De Musset (AR); Kussmaul (cardiac tamponade)
  • GI: Murphy (cholecystitis), Rovsing (appendicitis), Cullen & Grey-Turner (pancreatitis)
  • Neuro: Kernig, Brudzinski (meningitis); Babinski (UMN)
  • Naturopathic: Tongue (coating, colour), Nails (Beau lines, clubbing, Muehrcke)
